name: tailscale
pre_start:
launchctl print gui/$(id -u)/homebrew.mxcl.tailscale >/dev/null 2>&1 && launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/homebrew.mxcl.tailscale.plist >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -f ~/Library/LaunchAgents/homebrew.mxcl.tailscale.plist; sudo mkdir -p /etc/resolver; printf 'nameserver 100.100.100.100
domain home.arpa
search_order 1
timeout 5
' | sudo tee /etc/resolver/home.arpa >/dev/null
